overview: ML-Based Personalized Workout Recommendation System that generates adaptive weekly workout plans based on user profiles, tracks progress visually, and predicts goal achievement — all with a professional dark-themed interface.
features: Personalized weekly workout plan generation based on age, gender, height, weight, fitness goal, and experience level
Adaptive learning — adjusts next workout intensity based on Easy/Medium/Hard feedback
Visual progress tracking with weight trend charts and workout completion history
Goal prediction estimating weeks to reach your fitness target
Internet Identity login for persistent data across sessions
5-page professional dark-themed UI with smooth animations
